headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section 40. Maintenance of Records; Audit. Subcontractor shall keep and maintain full and detailed records and  accounts  of  all  materials,  equipment  and  labor  furnished,  delivered,  fabricated,  used,  consumed  and incorporated  into  the  Subcontract  Work.  Contractor  shall  be  given  complete  and  convenient  access  to  all  of Subcontractor's records, books, correspondence, instructions, drawings, receipts, vouchers, memoranda and similar documents  and  data  relating  to  the  Subcontract  and  the  Subcontract  Work.  Subcontractor  shall  maintain  and preserve all  such  records  and  documents  for  a  period  of  three  (3)  years  after  final  payment  hereunder  and  shall make such records and documents available to Contractor at any time within the three-year period.
